full_prompt_context:
🎯 CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: CREATE A COMPLETE 5-DAY ITINERARY
⚠️ MANDATORY: Generate plans for ALL 5 DAYS
📅 REQUIRED: Day 1 through Day 5

💰 BUDGET: Luxury - Adjust ALL recommendations accordingly!

🎯 DETAILED REQUIREMENTS for EACH DAY:
- SPECIFIC venue names, FULL addresses, contact info
- EXACT time slots: '9:00 AM - 11:00 AM (2 hours)'
- PRECISE costs matching Luxury budget
- DETAILED transport directions with options
- INSIDER TIPS and local secrets
- Opening hours, booking requirements
- Restaurant recommendations (Luxury-appropriate)
- Weather alternatives
- Cultural etiquette and phrases
- Photo opportunities

✨ MUST INCLUDE:
  • Include specific venue names with full addresses and contact details
  • Suggest specific restaurants with price ranges and signature dishes
  • Mention opening hours, booking requirements, and best visiting times
  • Add exact time allocations for each activity with start and end times
  • Provide alternative indoor/outdoor options for weather flexibility
  • Add insider tips and local secrets from experienced travelers
  • Include detailed transport directions with multiple options

📅 STRUCTURE: Day 1 through Day 5
  Each day: Morning, Afternoon, Evening plans

⚠️ FINAL: Must include ALL 5 days!
full_itinerary:
**Day 1: Exploring South Mumbai**

* **Morning (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the iconic **Gateway of India** (Apollo Bunder, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001, Phone: +91 22 2284 4141)
		- Exact time allocation: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry, but boat rides to Elephanta Caves cost ₹150 - ₹250 per person
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from your hotel to Gateway of India (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Try to avoid visiting during peak hours (11:00 AM - 3:00 PM) to avoid crowds
	+ Visit the nearby **Taj Mahal Palace Hotel** (Apollo Bunder, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001, Phone: +91 22 6665 3366) for a luxurious breakfast
		- Exact time allocation: 10:30 AM - 12:00 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,500 - ₹2,500 per person for breakfast
		- Transport directions: Walk from Gateway of India to Taj Mahal Palace Hotel (5 minutes)
* **Afternoon (12:00 PM - 5:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya** (159-161, Mahatma Gandhi Road, Fort, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400023, Phone: +91 22 2284 4484)
		- Exact time allocation: 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹65 - ₹100 per person
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Taj Mahal Palace Hotel to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
		- Insider tip: The museum has a great collection of Indian and European art
	+ Have lunch at **Leopold Cafe** (Colaba Causeway, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400039, Phone: +91 22 2282 1811)
		- Exact time allocation: 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for lunch
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya to Leopold Cafe (approximately ₹50 - ₹100, 10 minutes)
* **Evening (5:00 PM - 10:00 PM)**
	+ Take a sunset cruise at **Gateway of India** (Apollo Bunder, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001, Phone: +91 22 2284 4141)
		- Exact time allocation: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,500 - ₹2,500 per person
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Leopold Cafe to Gateway of India (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Book your cruise in advance to avoid last-minute hassles
	+ Have dinner at **Indigo** (4, Mandlik Road, Colaba, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400039, Phone: +91 22 6636 8999)
		- Exact time allocation: 7:00 PM - 10:00 PM (3 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹2,500 - ₹4,000 per person for dinner
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Gateway of India to Indigo (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)

**Day 2: Exploring Bollywood and Shopping**

* **Morning (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Film City** (Aarey Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065, Phone: +91 22 2845 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for guided tour
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from your hotel to Film City (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 45 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Try to catch a glimpse of a live shoot, but be respectful of the crew and actors
	+ Visit the **Red Carpet Wax Museum** (R City Mall, Ghatkopar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400086, Phone: +91 22 6770 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM (1 hour)
		- Precise costs: ₹300 - ₹500 per person
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Film City to Red Carpet Wax Museum (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
* **Afternoon (12:00 PM - 5:00 PM)**
	+ Have lunch at **Bastian** (B/1, New Kamal Building, Opposite National College, Linking Road, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050, Phone: +91 22 2649 5555)
		- Exact time allocation: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,000 - ₹2,000 per person for lunch
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Red Carpet Wax Museum to Bastian (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
	+ Visit the **Linking Road** for shopping (Linking Road, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050)
		- Exact time allocation: 1:30 PM - 4:00 PM (2.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹2,000 per person for shopping
		- Transport directions: Walk from Bastian to Linking Road (5 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Try to bargain at the street shops to get the best deals
* **Evening (5:00 PM - 10:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Hill Road** for more shopping and street food (Hill Road, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050)
		- Exact time allocation: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for shopping and street food
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Linking Road to Hill Road (approximately ₹50 - ₹100, 10 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Try the local street food, but make sure to eat at hygienic stalls
	+ Have dinner at **The Sassy Spoon** (Ground Floor, Express Towers, Nariman Point, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400021, Phone: +91 22 2288 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 7:00 PM - 10:00 PM (3 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹2,000 - ₹3,500 per person for dinner
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Hill Road to The Sassy Spoon (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)

**Day 3: Exploring Beaches and Nightlife**

* **Morning (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Juhu Beach** (Juhu Tara Road, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049, Phone: +91 22 2623 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from your hotel to Juhu Beach (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Try the local street food, but make sure to eat at hygienic stalls
	+ Visit the **Versova Beach** (Versova, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400061, Phone: +91 22 2631 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM (1 hour)
		- Precise costs: Free entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Juhu Beach to Versova Beach (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
* **Afternoon (12:00 PM - 5:00 PM)**
	+ Have lunch at **Gadda Da Vida** (Novotel Mumbai Juhu Beach, Balraj Sahani Marg, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049, Phone: +91 22 6693 3333)
		- Exact time allocation: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,500 - ₹2,500 per person for lunch
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Versova Beach to Gadda Da Vida (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
	+ Visit the **Water's Edge** at **The Leela Mumbai** (Sahar, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400059, Phone: +91 22 6691 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 1:30 PM - 4:00 PM (2.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,000 - ₹2,000 per person for drinks and snacks
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Gadda Da Vida to The Leela Mumbai (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Enjoy the beautiful views of the city skyline
* **Evening (5:00 PM - 10:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Aer Lounge** at **Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai** (114, Dr. E. Moses Road, Worli, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400018, Phone: +91 22 2481 8000)
		- Exact time allocation: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹1,500 - ₹2,500 per person for drinks and snacks
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from The Leela Mumbai to Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Enjoy the stunning views of the city skyline
	+ Have dinner at **Trilogy** (Hotel Sea Princess, Juhu Tara Road, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049, Phone: +91 22 2649 8888)
		- Exact time allocation: 7:00 PM - 10:00 PM (3 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹2,000 - ₹3,500 per person for dinner
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai to Trilogy (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)

**Day 4: Exploring History and Culture**

* **Morning (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Haji Ali Dargah** (Lala Lajpat Rai Marg, Haji Ali, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400026, Phone: +91 22 2351 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry, but donations are welcome
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from your hotel to Haji Ali Dargah (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Be respectful of the shrine and dress modestly
	+ Visit the **Mahalakshmi Temple** (Bhulabhai Desai Road, Breach Candy, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400026, Phone: +91 22 2351 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 10:30 AM - 12:00 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry, but donations are welcome
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Haji Ali Dargah to Mahalakshmi Temple (approximately ₹50 - ₹100, 10 minutes)
* **Afternoon (12:00 PM - 5:00 PM)**
	+ Have lunch at **Govinda's** (Hare Krishna Land, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049, Phone: +91 22 2623 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for lunch
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Mahalakshmi Temple to Govinda's (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
	+ Visit the **Chor Bazaar** (Mutton Street, Grant Road, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400007, Phone: +91 22 2388 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 1:30 PM - 4:00 PM (2.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for shopping
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Govinda's to Chor Bazaar (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Be prepared to bargain and haggle for the best deals
* **Evening (5:00 PM - 10:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **National Centre for the Performing Arts (NCPA)** (Nariman Point, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400021, Phone: +91 22 2282 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for shows and events
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Chor Bazaar to NCPA (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Check the schedule for upcoming events and book tickets in advance
	+ Have dinner at **Olive Bar & Kitchen** (14, Union Park, Khar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400052, Phone: +91 22 2605 8228)
		- Exact time allocation: 7:00 PM - 10:00 PM (3 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹2,000 - ₹3,500 per person for dinner
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from NCPA to Olive Bar & Kitchen (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)

**Day 5: Exploring Nature and Adventure**

* **Morning (9:00 AM - 12:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Sanjay Gandhi National Park** (Borivali East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400066, Phone: +91 22 2886 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹50 - ₹100 per person for entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from your hotel to Sanjay Gandhi National Park (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 45 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Take a guided tour to explore the park's flora and fauna
	+ Visit the **Kanheri Caves** (Sanjay Gandhi National Park, Borivali East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400066, Phone: +91 22 2886 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM (1 hour)
		- Precise costs: ₹50 - ₹100 per person for entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Sanjay Gandhi National Park to Kanheri Caves (approximately ₹50 - ₹100, 10 minutes)
* **Afternoon (12:00 PM - 5:00 PM)**
	+ Have lunch at **The Green House** (Aarey Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065, Phone: +91 22 2845 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM (1.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹500 - ₹1,000 per person for lunch
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Kanheri Caves to The Green House (approximately ₹100 - ₹150, 20 minutes)
	+ Visit the **Aarey Colony** for a nature walk (Aarey Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065, Phone: +91 22 2845 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 1:30 PM - 4:00 PM (2.5 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from The Green House to Aarey Colony (approximately ₹50 - ₹100, 10 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Take a guided tour to explore the colony's flora and fauna
* **Evening (5:00 PM - 10:00 PM)**
	+ Visit the **Powai Lake** for a sunset view (Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076, Phone: +91 22 2570 1111)
		- Exact time allocation: 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM (2 hours)
		- Precise costs: Free entry
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Aarey Colony to Powai Lake (approximately ₹150 - ₹250, 30 minutes)
		- Insider tip: Take a romantic boat ride on the lake
	+ Have dinner at **Mainland China** (Andheri Kurla Road, Andheri East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400059, Phone: +91 22 2820 2020)
		- Exact time allocation: 7:00 PM - 10:00 PM (3 hours)
		- Precise costs: ₹2,000 - ₹3,500 per person for dinner
		- Transport directions: Take a taxi from Powai Lake to Mainland China (approximately ₹200 - ₹300, 40 minutes)

**Weather Alternatives:**

* In case of heavy rain, visit the **Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya** or **National Centre for the Performing Arts (NCPA)** instead of outdoor activities.
* In case of extreme heat, visit the **Water's Edge** at **The Leela Mumbai** or **Aer Lounge** at **Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai** for a cool and relaxing evening.

**Cultural Etiquette and Phrases:**

* Greet people with a "Namaste" (hello) or "Dhanyavad" (thank you).
* Dress modestly when visiting temples or mosques.
* Remove your shoes when entering temples or homes.
* Use your right hand when eating or giving/receiving something.

**Photo Opportunities:**

* Take a photo in front of the **Gateway of India**.
* Capture the stunning views of the city skyline from **Aer Lounge**.
* Take a romantic photo at **Powai Lake** during sunset.
* Click a photo with the beautiful backdrop of **Sanjay Gandhi National Park**.

**Weather Alternatives:**

* In case of heavy rain, visit the **Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya** or **National Centre for the Performing Arts (NCPA)** instead of outdoor activities.
* In case of extreme heat, visit the **Water's Edge** at **The Leela Mumbai** or **Aer Lounge** at **Four Seasons Hotel Mumbai** for a cool and relaxing evening.

**Cultural Etiquette and Phrases:**

* Greet people with a "Namaste" (hello) or "Dhanyavad" (thank you).
* Dress modestly when visiting temples or mosques.
* Remove your shoes when entering temples or homes.
* Use your right hand when eating or giving/receiving something.

**Photo Opportunities:**

* Take a photo in front of the **Gateway of India**.
* Capture the stunning views of the city skyline from **Aer Lounge**.
* Take a romantic photo at **Powai Lake** during sunset.
* Click a photo with the beautiful backdrop of **Sanjay Gandhi National Park**.
